title: Karauli Shankar Mahadev Appointed Mahamandaleshwar of Naya Udasin Akhada in Grand Haridwar Ceremony
description: Karauli Shankar Mahadev has been elevated as Mahamandaleshwar of the Shri Panchayati Akhada Naya Udasin Nirvan, one of the prominent akhadas in the Sanatan tradition. The grand Pattabhishek (coronation) ceremony was held in Haridwar ahead of the upcoming Kumbh Mela.
